notes: V5 percussion export — artifacts reflect current repo state.
Authority labels follow instrument-maker v4.5 DXF-first visual authority guard.
Promote artifacts from derived_preview to fabrication only after reviewed DXF or measured build.

packets.summary: Frame drum played with a cello bow on the membrane edge — a hybrid between a frame drum and a bowed idiophone. Acoustic model covers membrane tension and bow-excitation frequency response.

artifacts.label: Design sheet
artifacts.notes: Governing acoustic model, parametric dimensions, and material assumptions.

artifacts.label: Bill of materials
artifacts.notes: Part list with quantities, materials, and estimated cost.

artifacts.label: Sourcing list
artifacts.notes: Supplier options, part numbers, and lead-time notes.

artifacts.label: Cut list
artifacts.notes: Stock dimensions and cut operations for each part.

artifacts.label: Validation table
artifacts.notes: Predicted vs measured values; names remaining measurement gates.

artifacts.label: Assembly manual
artifacts.notes: Step-by-step build sequence with torque and fit notes.

artifacts.label: Risk register
artifacts.notes: Acoustic, structural, ergonomic, supply, and fit/finish risks each with a verification test.

artifacts.label: Supplier RFQ
artifacts.notes: Request-for-quote template for outsourced or purchased parts.

artifacts.label: Visual BOM brief
artifacts.notes: Visual assembly overview; images are concept-only, not dimensional authority.

artifacts.label: Photo shot list
artifacts.notes: Required shots per build stage for build-log documentation.

artifacts.label: Visual output register
artifacts.notes: Records which artifacts are previews versus controlling geometry.

artifacts.label: Wolfram model — bowed-frame-drum-starter.wl
artifacts.notes: Acoustic physics source. Source-only — no executed runtime output claimed.
